description: exploitation — 5 known patterns, 2 dead ends. Previous taste session 28→44. This session targets 52→65+ via mechanical fixes + personality injection.
Taste score from eval: token=45, typo=90, spacing=70, motion=75, personality=35, components=45
learning: Starting point — biggest gap is visual personality (35) and token discipline (45)

description: Feed surface opacity + spacing normalization — 7 files, ~30 violations fixed
learning: 3-tier structural opacity system (0.03/0.05/0.10) works well for dark UI. Mechanical, zero risk.

description: Build + landing opacity/spacing normalization — 7 files, scale transform removed
learning: Same pattern applied to build surface. Removed anti-slop scale-0.97. Non-token #0a0a0a→warm black.
Diminishing returns on opacity normalization — fewer violations per file now.

description: Campus personality status line — time-aware UB voice + alive dot
learning: Campus-specific copy that's context-aware (time of day) creates more distinctiveness than generic stat labels. "Between classes energy" > "3 events today".

description: Creation celebration gold ring ping — one-shot on deploy complete
learning: Celebration moment uses unused design budget (rule 24). Gold ring ping + check scale-in makes best feature feel premium.
Minimal impact — sidebar already mostly clean. Micro-improvement.
text-white/10 was invisible — raised to white/30. Small but noticeable on landing.
